zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecilia de Vere於大約1175年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾拉普斯頓時，她的父親Sir Robert de Vere Lord of Twywell52歲，母親Matilda Furnell57歲。她和William II le Blount - 5th Baron Ixworth至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於大約1234年在英國英格蘭素福爾可易沃斯享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecilia de Vere于大约1175年出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾拉普斯頓时，她的父亲Sir Robert de Vere Lord of Twywell52岁，母亲Matilda Furnell57岁。她和William II le Blount - 5th Baron Ixworth至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于大约1234年在英国英格兰素福爾可易沃斯享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name, mostly from Vair in Ancenis, named with Gaulish ver(n)- ‘alder’. This was the probable home in the 11th century of the Breton lord Aubrey (Albericus) de Ver, who followed William the Conqueror to England and founded an influential family who held the earldom of Oxford until 1703. In a few cases the surname could be from other places in France, such as Ver in Manche and Calvados, which have the same etymology as Vair.
French (mainy Vendée; Veré): variant of Vairé, from Old French vairie ‘variegated, spotted’, applied as a nickname for someone who has freckles.

nameMeanings.name: Cecilia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

variants.name: Cecelia
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecilia de Vere was born about 1175, in Thrapston, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Robert de Vere Lord of Twywell, was 52 and her mother, Matilda Furnell, was 57. She had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with William II le Blount - 5th Baron Ixworth. She died about 1234, in Ixworth, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecilia de Vere est née environ 1175, à Thrapston, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert de Vere Lord of Twywell, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Matilda Furnell, avait 57 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec William II le Blount - 5th Baron Ixworth. Elle est décédée environ 1234, à Ixworth, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cecilia de Vere um 1175 in Thrapston, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert de Vere Lord of Twywell 52 und ihre Mutter Matilda Furnell 57. Sie hatte mit William II le Blount - 5th Baron Ixworth mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1234 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Ixworth, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cecilia de Vere è nata il circa 1175 nel Thrapston, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Robert de Vere Lord of Twywell, aveva 52 anni e sua madre, Matilda Furnell, aveva 57 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con William II le Blount - 5th Baron Ixworth. Morì circa 1234, nel Ixworth, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecilia de Vereが約1175年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアスラプストンで生まれた時，父Sir Robert de Vere Lord of Twywellは52歳，母Matilda Furnellは57歳であった。彼女はWilliam II le Blount - 5th Baron Ixworthとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1234年にイギリスイギリススフォルクイクスウオルスで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecilia de Vere(이)가 대략 1175년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 스라프스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert de Vere Lord of Twywell(은)는 52세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda Furnell(은)는 57세였다. 그녀는 William II le Blount - 5th Baron Ixworth(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1234년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 이스워스에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecilia de Vere nasceu aproximadamente 1175, em Thrapston, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Robert de Vere Lord of Twywell, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Furnell, tinha 57 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com William II le Blount - 5th Baron Ixworth. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1234, em Ixworth, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecilia de Vere родилась около 1175 г. в местности трапстон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Robert de Vere Lord of Twywell было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Matilda Furnell, 57. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от William II le Blount - 5th Baron Ixworth. Она умерла около 1234 г. в местности иксворт, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год.
